name: Chicken, Broccoli and Cheddar Loaf
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked chicken, diced (or ham or turkey)
1 package Frozen broccoli (10 oz pkg), thawed and well drained
2 cups Low fat Cheddar cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Let frozen bread dough thaw until pliable.
2. Meanwhile, prepare filling. In a medium bowl, combine meat, onion, garlic, salt, and pepper. Mix well. Set aside.
3. On a lightly floured surface, roll dough out to a 14- by 9-inch rectangle. If the dough shrinks back after rolling, let it rest for a few minutes, then roll again.
4. Evenly top the dough with meat mixture lengthwise down the center third of the dough.
5. Top with broccoli and cheese.
6. Fold up the sides of the dough and seal. Place on a greased baking sheet, seam side down.
7. Bake in a preheated 375-degree oven for 30-40 minutes or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on.
8. Remove from pan; cool on wire rack. Slice and serve.
